question: How quickly can I generate quotes with CONSTRUKTR?
answer: Take photos of the job site and get professional quotes in under 30 seconds. Our AI calculates materials, labor, and pricing automatically.

question: Does CONSTRUKTR work for all types of contractors?
answer: Yes! CONSTRUKTR supports HVAC, plumbing, electrical, roofing, painting, landscaping, handyman, and general contracting work with trade-specific features for each.

question: Can I get paid the same day with CONSTRUKTR?
answer: Yes! Accept payments on-site with our integrated card reader and get same-day deposits upon job completion.

answer: Start immediately with full access to all features. No credit card required. Cancel anytime with no charges.

question: What's included with the annual discount?
answer: Annual plans save you 20% compared to monthly billing. You get the same features and support, just at a better rate when you commit to a full year.
